idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends searches for 'warehouse worker shortage' signals labor tightness
behavior: An increase in searches for warehouse worker shortage suggests rising labor scarcity in logistics-heavy sectors.

market_impact.rationale: Labor shortages in industrial sectors likely increase costs and disrupt supply chains.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly searches for 'warehouse worker shortage' rise more than 15% over prior 4 weeks
trade_logic.exit: When searches decline below 10% above 4-week prior average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor tightness topics often fluctuate weekly and can spike due to seasonal demand or economic shifts.

idea: Daily jump in consumer stress Google Trends searches for 'car repossession' signals rising financial distress
behavior: Spikes in searches for repossession indicate consumer financial strain that may impact discretionary spending.

market_impact.rationale: Higher consumer stress reduces discretionary spending, pressuring retail and leisure sectors.

trade_logic.entry: If daily searches for 'car repossession' increase over 25% compared to prior 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: Once searches fall below 10% above prior 7-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Financial stress indicators fluctuate with economic conditions and can spike due to unemployment or credit tightening.

idea: Weekly rise in freight logistics port container volume delays signals supply chain disruption
behavior: An increase in reported port container volume delays implies congestion that slows goods movement.

market_impact.rationale: Commodity and materials supply chains get disrupted, pressuring industrial and materials sectors.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly port container volume delay index rises 10% above 4-week moving average
trade_logic.exit: When delay index falls below 5% above 4-week moving average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Port congestion regularly fluctuates with shipping cycles, seasonal demand, and labor conditions.

idea: Daily spike in Google Trends searches for 'emergency plumber' signals consumer home repair stress
behavior: Sudden rise in emergency plumbing searches points to acute household repair needs raising discretionary spending.

market_impact.rationale: Home repair demand boosts discretionary retail and services related to household maintenance.

trade_logic.entry: If daily searches exceed prior 7-day average by 30%
trade_logic.exit: When daily searches drop below 10% above 7-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Home repair urgencies frequently spike with weather changes or infrastructure aging.

idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends searches for 'truck driver strike' signals imminent logistics disruption
behavior: Increased interest in truck driver strikes often precedes actual labor actions disrupting freight transport.

market_impact.rationale: Labor disputes in trucking raise costs and delay supply chains in industrial sectors.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly searches for 'truck driver strike' rise 20% above 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: When searches decline below 10% above 4-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor unrest topics frequently trend weekly before actual strikes or contract negotiations.

idea: Daily jump in Google Trends searches for 'electric vehicle battery failure' signals consumer tech stress
behavior: A spike in EV battery failure searches points to consumer quality concerns that may impact EV adoption sentiment.

market_impact.rationale: Negative sentiment on EVs pressures technology and auto-related consumer sectors.

trade_logic.entry: If daily searches increase 25% over prior 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: Once searches fall below 10% above prior 7-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Consumer tech issues frequently spike unpredictably due to product defects or recalls.

idea: Weekly increase in Google Trends searches for 'small business loan default' signals rising credit stress
behavior: More searches on loan defaults suggest financial stress among small businesses, possibly foreshadowing economic weakness.

market_impact.rationale: Rising defaults impact financial sector asset quality and credit availability.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly searches increase at least 15% above prior 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: When searches decline below 10% above prior 4-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Credit stress indicators fluctuate with economic cycles and often rise sharply in downturns.

idea: Daily spike in Google Trends searches for 'home heating system failure' signals winter utility stress
behavior: Increased searches for heating failures indicate household energy demand surges and potential utility sector stress.

market_impact.rationale: Utilities benefit from emergency heating repairs and higher winter energy consumption.

trade_logic.entry: If daily searches exceed 30% over prior 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: When searches drop below 10% above 7-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Heating system issues spike seasonally with cold weather extremes.

idea: Weekly jump in Google Trends searches for 'airport security delay' signals travel mobility disruptions
behavior: Rising searches for airport security delays indicate growing travel friction that may reduce air travel demand.

market_impact.rationale: Travel and leisure sectors suffer when mobility bottlenecks increase consumer friction.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly searches rise 20% above 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: When searches decline below 10% above 4-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Travel bottlenecks fluctuate regularly with seasonal travel and regulatory changes.

idea: Daily jump in RSS news counts mentioning 'labor strike' signals imminent industrial disruption
behavior: A sudden increase in news volume on labor strikes typically precedes actual work stoppages affecting industries.

market_impact.rationale: Strikes disrupt industrial production and supply chains, hurting sector earnings.

trade_logic.entry: If daily labor strike news count spikes 50% above 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: When news counts fall below 20% above 7-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor strike news surges frequently around contract talks and economic stress.

idea: Weekly rise in FRED CPI energy price index signals rising input cost pressure on energy sector
behavior: A fast increase in energy CPI indicates rising costs that typically lead to energy sector margin expansion as prices rise.

market_impact.rationale: Energy producers benefit from rising energy prices and input cost pass-through.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly CPI energy price index rises 1% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Once growth slows to below 0.25% week-over-week

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Energy prices fluctuate regularly due to geopolitical and supply shocks.

idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends searches for 'DIY electronics repair' signals consumer tech stress
behavior: Rising DIY electronics repair searches indicate consumers delaying professional repairs, signaling cost-conscious behavior.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer tech services and retailers may see pressure as users self-serve repairs.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly searches rise 20% above prior 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: When searches fall below 10% above prior 4-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: DIY consumer behavior shifts often trend seasonally or after new product launches.

idea: Daily spike in Google Trends searches for 'emergency car battery replacement' signals auto repair stress
behavior: Spikes in emergency car battery replacement searches indicate urgent vehicle maintenance demand impacting consumer discretionary.

market_impact.rationale: Auto parts and repair services benefit from increased urgent maintenance searches.

trade_logic.entry: If daily searches exceed prior 7-day average by 30%
trade_logic.exit: Once daily searches drop below 10% above prior 7-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Vehicle maintenance issues frequently spike due to weather or seasonal demands.

idea: Weekly increase in USGS earthquake activity within key logistics hubs signals potential freight delays
behavior: Rising earthquake activity near major freight hubs can disrupt transport and supply chains temporarily.

market_impact.rationale: Supply chain disruption pressures industrial sector earnings.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly earthquake count in key logistics regions rises 50% above 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: When earthquake activity falls below 20% above 4-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seismic activity fluctuates and occasionally clusters in regions critical for logistics.

idea: Weekly surge in political insider filings selling in the energy sector signals near-term bearish pressure

data.source: Political insider trading filings weekly aggregated

behavior: An increase in insider selling activity in energy stocks often precedes sector underperformance.

market_impact.rationale: Insiders selling indicates negative outlook or overvaluation concerns.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly insider sell filings volume in energy sector exceeds 20% above 8-week average
trade_logic.exit: When filings volume falls below 10% above 8-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Insider selling patterns show medium-frequency periodic spikes ahead of sector moves.
